endpoints.name: Get your list of dictionaries
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY.

endpoints.name: Upload a dictionary (CSV)
endpoints.description: Upload a dictionary (CSV format) to your VisibleThread account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get your list of documents
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY.

endpoints.name: Upload a document
endpoints.description:
Upload a document to your VisibleThread account. 
We return a JSON response that contains a "docId" that represents your document.        
You can use this id in other requests to check on the analysis status for the document and run a dictionary search and retrieve search
results.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get data from a previously submitted document
endpoints.description: Get data from a previously submitted document identified by ***docId***
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY. Replace {{DOCID}} with a real docid.

endpoints.name: Get your list of searches
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY.

endpoints.name: Run a search
endpoints.description: Run a search on document **docId** using dictionary **dictId**
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY.

endpoints.name: Gets search results for a particular document/dictionary
endpoints.description: Get detailed results for a scan/url (readability, long sentence and passive language instances), identified by **scanId** & **urlId**
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY. Replace {{DICTIONARYID}} with a real dictionaryid. Replace {{DOCID}} with a real docid.

endpoints.name: Get your list of scans
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY.

endpoints.name: Run a new scan
endpoints.description:
The scan runs in the background but returns immediately with a JSON response containing an "id" that represents your scan.        
You can use this id in other requests to retrieve your scan result. 

Also, an "id" is returned for each url which can be used to retrieve detailed results for individual scan urls.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get data from a previously run scan
endpoints.description: Get data from a previously run scan, identified by **scanId**
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY. Replace {{SCANID}} with a real scanid.

endpoints.name: Gets data for a particular scan/webUrl
endpoints.description: Get detailed results for a scan/url (readability, long sentence and passive language instances), identified by **scanId** & **urlId**
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VISIBLETHREAD_API_KEY}} with your VISIBLETHREAD API KEY. Replace {{SCANID}} with a real scanid. Replace {{URLID}} with a real urlid.
